content.text: Please run a full end-to-end submission test for each support request type below to confirm things perform as expected and to demonstrate to stakeholders that all routes are functioning.
Complete a full submission through the portal (all required fields for that type).
Confirm the request submits successfully and the route/API behaves as expected.
Take a screenshot of the resulting case/record in Salesforce and attach it to this ticket (or link it).
Use the table below as your checklist; fill in the "Passed Testing" column (e.g. Yes + link to screenshot or attach).
Support request types – required vs optional fields:

| Request | Required fields | Optional fields | Passed Testing |
|--------|----------------------------------------|----------------------------------|----------------|
| Request Notice Packet | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address | CPT ID | |
| Request Passcode | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone | CPT ID | |
| Update Mailing Address | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Previous Address, New Address | CPT ID | |
| Request Name Change | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address, Previous Name, New Name, Supporting Documentation | CPT ID, Additional Description | |
| Deceased Class Member | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address, SSN/Tax ID, Beneficiary Name, Beneficiary Address, Beneficiary Email, Supporting Documentation | CPT ID, Additional Description | |
| Request to Be Added to Case | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address, Supporting Documentation | Additional Description | |
| Respond to Dispute Notice | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address, Supporting Documentation | CPT ID | |
| Respond to Deficient Notice | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address, Supporting Documentation | CPT ID | |
| Respond to SSN/W9 Request | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address, SSN/Tax ID | CPT ID, Supporting Documentation, Additional Description | |
| Request Check Reissue | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Previous Address, New Address | CPT ID | |
| Request Cashed Check Copy | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address | CPT ID | |
| Request Tax Forms | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address, SSN/Tax ID | CPT ID | |
| Request Fraud Affidavit Packet | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address | CPT ID | |
| Did you Receive my Response? | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address | CPT ID | |
| Have you Received my Supporting Documents? | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address | CPT ID | |
| What is my Settlement Amount? | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address | CPT ID | |
| When will I Receive my Settlement Payment? | First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Phone, Address | CPT ID | |
